supply_chain.dependencies: Single or sole-source components used in manufacture; substantially all injection molded component tooling owned by company; unique TASER 10 CED components subject to ATF import permits; petroleum-based raw materials subject to price fluctuations
supply_chain.risks: Supplier decommitments; material shortages; semiconductor supply chain disruptions; port constraints; customs clearance issues; tariffs (US-China trade tensions); export restrictions on raw materials (China restrictions on gallium and germanium); forced labor legislation risks; potential increased tariffs under proposed US policy changes

regulatory_risks: ATF regulation of TASER 10 CED as firearm under Gun Control Act
Federal firearms license compliance and periodic ATF audits
State and local firearm laws impacting TASER 10 CED sales
Export controls - DOC crime control product classification requiring export licenses
Deemed export licensing for foreign national employees
International arms brokering regulations and Arms Trade Treaty compliance
Federal procurement regulations (FAR) for US government contracts
Privacy and data protection laws (GDPR, California Privacy Rights Act, Vietnam Personal Data Protection Decree)
Environmental regulations (EU RoHS Directive, WEEE Directive, REACH, PFAS restrictions)
Climate-related disclosure requirements (EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, California climate laws, SEC climate rules)
FCC radio spectrum regulations for wireless products
FAA and other agency regulations for drone operations
Consumer Product Safety Act compliance and potential product recalls
AI regulation (EU AI Act and similar emerging frameworks)
OECD global minimum tax (Pillar Two) implementation

sanction_risks: US-China trade tensions and tariff escalation
Western sanctions on Russia (potential cyber-attack retaliation)
Export license restrictions to certain countries
Potential bans on TASER/Axon products in certain jurisdictions
Geopolitical tensions affecting customer budgets and policies
Ongoing conflicts (Gaza, Ukraine) creating economic uncertainty
